The '''''Foxcatch''''' was a heavily modified [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] owned by [[Jodo Kast]]. Its tail was emblazoned with Kast's personal emblem.

All three wings were shortened considerably, and six [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom]] [[4L4 fusial thrust engine/Legends|4L4 fusial thrust engines]] were mounted on its wings and body. The ship's armament was increased by adding two additional [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] on the wings, for a total of twelve.

Kast was not seen with the ''Foxcatch'' in any of his better-known exploits.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=One That Got Away|book=Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope|reprint=1}}
*''[[Boba Fett: Twin Engines of Destruction]]''
